name: Giant Invasion RPG
description:
⊹₊˚‧︵‿₊୨᯽୧₊‿︵‧˚₊⊹

It's the end of the world as we know it...

There are big people here now... aah! Why? How? From where? Who exactly? That's sorta up to you! Very broad bot made to appeal to the widest possible audience... which means it'll require a decent amount of effort from you, the humble user, to keep on track. Sizes, number, gender distribution, general personality and purpose... all this was intentionally left undefined so you can customize and have a more unique experience.

Unfortunately I'm only gonna be able to put out this bot today. The other two will be out on Monday, and will be a lot more focused and have actual stories and stuff behind them.

════════════════════════════════════════

The Scenarios

Intro 1: An extremely basic intro in case you don't have anything else to start with. Practically cobbled this one together. I recommend just writing your own intro for this bot, it'll ultimately probably be more satisfying.

Intro 2: Make your own scenario (recommended for this bot)

════════════════════════════════════════

Par's Chat Corner, Q&A Time!

Q: What was your inspiration for this bot?

A: It's a fairly tried-and-true scenario, so I figured I'd try my hand at it. No singular inspiration to be honest.

Q: What will the other two bots be like?

A: This is supposed to be a catch-all bot. What are the giants like? Are they all female or is there a mix in gender? Why are they here? How are they here? Where are they from? Who knows! Who cares! That's up to you!
The other two bots are not gonna be like that at all. The anthro/furry invasion bot is going to be just that. A proper, militant invasion with defined sizes, motivations, etc.
The alien invasion bot is going to be an 'accidental' invasion. Big gals come to a fun vacation spot. After destroying a good chunk of humanity, they realize there are 'pests' infesting their vacation spot. Up to you to try to stop them (or... you know, don't.)

════════════════════════════════════════

What to expect coming soon™!

Size Bots:

Invasion RPG Bot (Two more bots to come. Gonna do these instead of the maid bot for Monday because I'm too busy to get them done this weekend.) [Monday 2/9]

Demon Lord's Maid (This one is gonna be fairly interesting. You're the leader of a typical JRPG-esque hero's party tryna confront the typical JRPG Demon Lord... except you find out his castle's at like 120x scale and one of his maid's gonna screw around with you.) [Pushed back, likely Friday 2/20]

Possibly Owner Characters? (Might make a short series about women owning foreign users. So basically a German character owning a non-German character, American owning a non-American, Japanese owning non-Japanese, etc. Not gonna explicitly make it raceplay, since I'm ambivalent towards that but it'll definitely be something y'all can steer it towards if that's your cup of tea.) [No timeline as of yet]
